name: BG-Remover Health Check
description: Verify bg-remover API is healthy: check /health endpoint, validate S3 output bucket access, confirm Bedrock Nova Canvas model is reachable, and return a readiness summary.

steps.name: bgr_health
steps.prompt: Hit GET /health on the bg-remover service (stage: {stage}, tenant: {tenant_id}). Verify response is 200 with {healthy: true}. Return JSON: { healthy, version, stage, latency_ms }

steps.name: bgr_s3_check
steps.prompt: Verify the S3 output bucket for bg-remover exists and is writable (stage: {stage}, tenant: {tenant_id}). Attempt a HEAD request on a test key. Context: {bgr_health}. Return JSON: { bucket_exists, writable, bucket_name }

steps.name: bgr_bedrock_check
steps.prompt: Verify Bedrock Nova Canvas model access for bg-remover. Confirm model ID is accessible in the configured AWS region. Context: {bgr_health}. Return JSON: { model_accessible, model_id, region }

steps.name: bgr_readiness_summary
